ksa_text: Skill in deploying, configuring, and scaling data platform components using infrastructure-as-code with version control and automated testing.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in secure test plan design (e. g. unit, integration, system, acceptance).

top_anchors.element_label: Skill in secure test plan design (e. g. unit, integration, system, acceptance).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Architecture & Analytics is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of AI/ML. This skill KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Data Architecture & Analytics), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.432). External validation of this skill KSA for the Director of AI/ML role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: DAMA-DMBOK, analytics maturity models (Gartner, Forrester), and analytics leadership surveys confirm data architecture and analytics competencies for senior roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Data Architecture & Analytics for the Director of AI/ML is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Data Architecture & Analytics skill KSA is within scope for the Director of AI/ML at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
